contract_claim: L1-9: Module docstring states Phase 1 finds functions 'with callers but no call site passes those optional params.' Phase 1 does NOT check whether call sites pass optional params — it only collects call sites for candidates. The determination of whether params are actually passed is done exclusively in Phase 2 by the LLM. An AI agent reading this may incorrectly assume Phase 1 has filtering logic for param-passing.
observed_behavior: Update Phase 1 description to: 'find exported functions with optional parameters that have callers — collecting all call sites for LLM verification in Phase 2.'
